Function: _isspace
Address: 0x45C890


/* Library Function - Single Match
    _isspace
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

int __cdecl _isspace(int _C)

{
  int iVar1;
  
  if (1 < DAT_00471c3c) {
    iVar1 = __isctype(_C,8);
    return iVar1;
  }
  return *(ushort *)(PTR_DAT_00471a30 + _C * 2) & 8;
}
